title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Work on enterprise Java applications for global clients. Design and develop scalable microservices, mentor junior developers, and participate in code reviews.
requirements: 5+ years Java experience, Spring Boot, Microservices, REST APIs, MySQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build and maintain e-commerce platform features. Work with React, Node.js, and microservices architecture to deliver high-quality user experiences.
requirements: 3+ years experience, React, Node.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, MongoDB, Redis, REST APIs, Git

title: Data Scientist
description: Apply machine learning to solve complex business problems. Build recommendation systems, forecasting models, and work with large-scale data.
requirements: Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, TensorFlow, PyTorch, SQL, Statistics, AWS, Spark

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage cloud infrastructure, implement CI/CD pipelines, and ensure high availability of services. Work with AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes.
requirements: 3+ years DevOps experience, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Terraform, Linux, Python, Shell scripting

title: Frontend Developer
description: Build responsive and performant web applications. Work with React, Redux, and modern JavaScript to create seamless user experiences.
requirements: 2+ years React experience, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, Redux, Webpack, Git

title: Backend Developer - Python
description: Develop scalable backend services for food delivery platform. Work with Python, Django, PostgreSQL, and microservices.
requirements: 3+ years Python, Django, Flask, PostgreSQL, Redis, REST APIs, Microservices, AWS

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: Design and implement automated test frameworks. Work with Selenium, TestNG, and CI/CD pipelines.
requirements: 3+ years QA experience, Selenium, Java, TestNG, Cucumber, Jenkins, API testing, Postman

title: Product Manager
description: Define product strategy and roadmap for payment solutions. Work with engineering, design, and business teams.
requirements: 5+ years product management, Fintech experience, Agile, User research, Data analysis, SQL

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Design intuitive and beautiful user interfaces. Create wireframes, prototypes, and conduct user research.
requirements: 3+ years UI/UX design, Figma, Adobe XD, User research, Prototyping, Mobile design, Design systems

title: Mobile Developer - Android
description: Build and maintain Android applications. Work with Kotlin, MVVM architecture, and modern Android development practices.
requirements: 3+ years Android development, Kotlin, Java, MVVM, Retrofit, Room, Coroutines, Git

title: Cloud Architect
description: Design and implement cloud solutions on Azure. Work with enterprise clients on cloud migration and architecture.
requirements: 7+ years experience, Azure, AWS, Cloud architecture, Microservices, Kubernetes, Terraform, Security

title: Chartered Accountant
description: Provide audit, tax, and advisory services to clients. Work on financial reporting, compliance, and risk management.
requirements: CA qualified, 3+ years experience, Audit, Taxation, Financial reporting, IFRS, Ind AS, Excel

title: Financial Analyst
description: Analyze financial data, prepare reports, and support investment decisions. Work with financial modeling and forecasting.
requirements: MBA Finance, 2+ years experience, Financial modeling, Excel, PowerPoint, SQL, Data analysis

title: Investment Banker
description: Work on M&A deals, IPOs, and corporate finance transactions. Conduct financial analysis and due diligence.
requirements: MBA from top B-school, 3+ years IB experience, Financial modeling, Valuation, Excel, PowerPoint

title: Risk Manager
description: Assess and manage credit risk, operational risk, and market risk. Develop risk mitigation strategies.
requirements: 5+ years risk management, Banking experience, Credit analysis, Risk modeling, Regulatory compliance

title: Medical Officer
description: Provide medical care to patients, conduct diagnoses, and prescribe treatments. Work in multi-specialty hospital.
requirements: MBBS, 2+ years experience, Clinical skills, Patient care, Medical knowledge, Communication

title: Staff Nurse
description: Provide nursing care to patients, administer medications, and assist doctors in medical procedures.
requirements: B.Sc Nursing, 1+ years experience, Patient care, Medical procedures, Communication, Compassion

title: Pharmacist
description: Dispense medications, counsel patients, and manage pharmacy inventory. Ensure medication safety.
requirements: B.Pharm/D.Pharm, 2+ years experience, Pharmacy knowledge, Patient counseling, Inventory management

title: Medical Representative
description: Promote pharmaceutical products to doctors and healthcare professionals. Achieve sales targets.
requirements: B.Pharm/Life Sciences, 2+ years pharma sales, Communication, Presentation, Territory management

title: Production Engineer
description: Manage production processes, ensure quality standards, and optimize manufacturing efficiency.
requirements: B.E. Mechanical, 3+ years manufacturing, Production planning, Quality control, Lean manufacturing

title: Quality Engineer
description: Implement quality control processes, conduct inspections, and ensure compliance with standards.
requirements: B.E. Mechanical/Industrial, 3+ years QC experience, Six Sigma, ISO standards, Quality tools

title: Mechanical Engineer
description: Design and develop mechanical systems for infrastructure projects. Work on CAD modeling and analysis.
requirements: B.E. Mechanical, 2+ years experience, AutoCAD, SolidWorks, Design, Analysis, Project management

title: Supply Chain Manager
description: Manage end-to-end supply chain operations, optimize logistics, and reduce costs.
requirements: MBA/B.E., 5+ years SCM experience, Logistics, Inventory management, SAP, Vendor management

title: Business Development Manager
description: Drive business growth, acquire new clients, and build strategic partnerships. Achieve revenue targets.
requirements: MBA, 4+ years B2B sales, EdTech experience, Negotiation, Presentation, CRM, Communication

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description: Plan and execute digital marketing campaigns. Manage SEO, SEM, social media, and content marketing.
requirements: 3+ years digital marketing, SEO, SEM, Google Ads, Facebook Ads, Analytics, Content strategy

title: Content Writer
description: Create engaging content for website, blog, and social media. Write copy for marketing campaigns.
requirements: 2+ years content writing, SEO writing, Creative writing, Research, Editing, Communication

title: Sales Manager
description: Lead sales team, develop sales strategies, and achieve revenue targets. Manage key accounts.
requirements: MBA, 5+ years sales management, Team leadership, B2B sales, CRM, Negotiation

title: Customer Support Executive
description: Handle customer queries, resolve issues, and ensure customer satisfaction. Work in 24/7 support environment.
requirements: Graduate, 1+ years customer support, Communication, Problem-solving, CRM, Patience

title: Process Associate
description: Handle back-office processes, data entry, and documentation. Ensure accuracy and meet SLAs.
requirements: Graduate, 0-2 years experience, MS Office, Data entry, Attention to detail, Communication

title: Team Leader - Customer Service
description: Lead customer service team, monitor performance, and ensure quality standards. Handle escalations.
requirements: 3+ years BPO experience, Team management, Customer service, Quality monitoring, Communication

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze business data, create reports, and provide insights. Work with SQL, Python, and visualization tools.
requirements: 2+ years data analysis, SQL, Python, Excel, Tableau, Power BI, Statistics, Communication
